title: Neutrogena Hydro Boost Water Gel Moisturizer 1.7oz
description: Neutrogena Hydro Boost Water Gel is an oil-free facial moisturizer that delivers continuous hydration to keep skin looking smooth, supple and hydrated. The unique water-gel formula contains Hyaluronic Acid that helps attract moisture and lock it in, providing a burst of hydration all day long.
bulletPoints: Oil-free, non-comedogenic formula absorbs instantly without any greasy residue
Hyaluronic Acid draws in and locks in moisture for 24-hour hydration
Dermatologist tested and recommended for normal to oily skin types
Lightweight gel texture melts into skin for a soft, smooth finish
Fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive skin

title: Dove Men+Care Extra Fresh Body Wash 18oz
description: Dove Men+Care Extra Fresh Body Wash combines effective cleansing with MicroMoisture technology to fight skin dryness. This invigorating body wash features a fresh, cooling scent that leaves skin feeling clean and refreshed without the tight, dry feeling that some soaps leave behind.
bulletPoints: MicroMoisture technology activates on skin to fight dryness with every wash
Cooling fresh scent energizes your morning shower routine
Clinically proven to fight skin dryness better than ordinary soap
pH-balanced formula is gentle enough for daily use
18 oz size provides long-lasting value for the whole family

title: L'Oreal Paris Elvive Total Repair 5 Shampoo 28oz
description: L'Oreal Paris Elvive Total Repair 5 Shampoo targets 5 signs of damaged hair: weakness, roughness, dullness, split ends, and dehydration. Formulated with Ceramide and Protein, this repairing shampoo leaves hair feeling stronger, smoother, and visibly healthier with every wash.
bulletPoints: Targets 5 signs of damage: weakness, roughness, dullness, split ends, and dehydration
Fortified with Ceramide and Protein to reinforce the hair fiber from within
Lathers into a rich, luxurious foam that deeply cleanses without stripping
For best results, follow with Elvive Total Repair 5 Conditioner
Safe for color-treated hair and suitable for daily use

title: Colgate Total Whitening Toothpaste 4.8oz
description: Colgate Total Whitening Toothpaste provides whole-mouth health protection against bacteria on teeth, tongue, cheeks, and gums for 12 hours. The advanced formula helps remove surface stains while fighting cavities, gingivitis, plaque, tartar, sensitivity, and bad breath all in one toothpaste.
bulletPoints: 12-hour antibacterial protection across your whole mouth, not just teeth
Fights 6 dental health issues: cavities, gingivitis, plaque, tartar, sensitivity, and bad breath
Whitening formula visibly brightens teeth by removing surface stains
ADA Accepted and clinically proven for superior whole-mouth health
Fresh mint flavor leaves mouth feeling clean and breath refreshed

title: Pantene Pro-V Daily Moisture Renewal Conditioner 27.7oz
description: Pantene Pro-V Daily Moisture Renewal Conditioner is specially designed to replenish dry hair with intense moisture and nutrients. Pro-Vitamin formula penetrates deep into the hair shaft to repair damage from root to tip, leaving hair silky smooth, shiny, and 10x stronger against breakage.
bulletPoints: Pro-Vitamin B5 formula penetrates deep to repair and strengthen hair from within
10x stronger against breakage versus non-conditioning shampoo
Lightweight moisture that won't weigh hair down or leave residue
Replenishes dry, brittle hair and seals split ends for smoother texture
27.7 oz family-size bottle — ideal for daily use on medium to long hair

title: Head & Shoulders Classic Clean Shampoo 23.7oz
description: Head & Shoulders Classic Clean Shampoo delivers up to 100% flake-free hair from the very first wash. The clinically proven formula targets dandruff-causing microbes at the scalp while leaving hair clean, manageable, and smelling fresh with an iconic clean scent.
bulletPoints: Up to 100% dandruff protection — clinically proven from the first wash
Targets dandruff-causing microbes at the source for long-lasting scalp health
Cleans and refreshes hair and scalp without over-drying
Classic Clean scent is long-lasting and loved by over 200 million people
Suitable for daily use and safe for color-treated hair

title: Olay Regenerist Micro-Sculpting Serum 1.3oz
description: Olay Regenerist Micro-Sculpting Serum is a concentrated anti-aging facial serum that visibly firms and lifts skin in just 28 days. The advanced formula with Niacinamide, Amino-Peptide Complex II, and Hyaluronic Acid penetrates 10 surface layers to regenerate skin cells for visibly firmer, smoother skin.
bulletPoints: Penetrates 10 surface skin layers to regenerate surface cells for firmer skin
Advanced Amino-Peptide Complex II with Niacinamide boosts collagen production
Hyaluronic Acid plumps and hydrates for a visible reduction in fine lines
Fragrance-free formula is suitable for sensitive skin and daily use
Clinically tested: 99% of women saw improvement in skin firmness within 28 days

title: Gillette Mach3 Razor 1 Count
description: The Gillette Mach3 Razor features three progressively aligned blades that cut hair more efficiently for a close, comfortable shave. The anti-friction, DuraComfort blades glide smoothly over skin while the Indicator Lubrication Strip fades to white when shaving benefit is diminished, signaling when to replace the blade.
bulletPoints: 3 progressively aligned DuraComfort blades for a closer, more comfortable shave
Anti-friction coating reduces friction for a smooth glide with every stroke
Indicator Lubrication Strip fades to white when it's time to change the blade
Pivoting head with 5 microfins stretches skin to prepare hair for the blade
Compatible with all Gillette Mach3 replacement blade cartridges

title: Aveeno Daily Moisturizing Lotion 18oz
description: Aveeno Daily Moisturizing Lotion is clinically proven to improve the health of dry skin in just one day, with continued improvement in 2 weeks. Formulated with Active Naturals Colloidal Oat and rich emollients, this fast-absorbing lotion soothes and moisturizes dry skin without any greasy feel.
bulletPoints: Clinically proven to improve dry skin health in just 1 day of use
Active Naturals Colloidal Oat locks in moisture and soothes skin irritation
Lightweight, non-greasy formula absorbs quickly into skin
Fragrance-free and hypoallergenic — ideal for sensitive skin
National Eczema Association accepted and dermatologist recommended

title: Crest 3D Whitestrips Professional Effects 20 Treatments
description: Crest 3D Whitestrips Professional Effects deliver professional-level teeth whitening results at home. The advanced seal technology keeps strips firmly in place while the enamel-safe whitening gel removes years of set-in stains from coffee, wine, and tobacco to reveal a noticeably whiter smile in just 20 days.
bulletPoints: Removes 14 years of set-in stains for a noticeably whiter smile in 20 days
Advanced Seal No-Slip Technology keeps strips in place — talk and drink water while whitening
Enamel-safe formula recommended by dentists for safe at-home whitening
20 treatments included — use one upper and one lower strip daily for best results
Results last up to 12 months with periodic maintenance treatments
